programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Truth: Is Our Sisterhood Real?; Unlock: Friends and Family ...?
programme.desc: Monique was just 17 when she met her supposed sister, Merrycle, but lingering questions about whether they share a father now threaten their bond; Ebony suspects that her fiancé, Jessie, has been cheating with people close to her; their relationship has been spiraling for the past five months, but Jessie insists Ebony is mischaracterizing the situation and says he's given her full access to his phone.

programme.desc: College football-watching devolves into a costly car collision; former high school friends fight over who is to blame.
